text: ### SAP BODS: Transform: Qry_Sales_Calc; Source: VBAK (Sales Header), VBAP (Sales Item); Logic: Join on VBELN; New Field: TOTAL_VALUE = VBAP.NETWR + VBAP.MWSBK; Filter: VBAK.ERDAT > '20230101'; ### Snowflake SQL: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW SALES_CALC_VW AS SELECT h.VBELN, i.POSNR, i.NETWR + i.MWSBK AS TOTAL_VALUE, h.ERDAT FROM VBAK h JOIN VBAP i ON h.VBELN = i.VBELN WHERE h.ERDAT > '2023-01-01';
